validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web typecheck (next typegen + tsc --noEmit) ; @intelliflow/application build (tsup DTS)

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run deals/[id]+LossReasonModal+DealForm+(list) (92) ; @intelliflow/application OpportunityService.additional (75)

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: eslint --max-warnings 0 on 6 touched web files + @intelliflow/application OpportunityService.ts/additional.test.ts

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build (next build --webpack, with CI env stubs) ; @intelliflow/application build

gate_results.log_path: TypeScript / Tests / Lint / Build all exit 0. Web build needs the CI Supabase/Prisma env stubs (pre-ship build step injects them); verified green with those stubs.

page.tsx is coverage-EXCLUDED (vitest.config + check-diff-coverage), so its changed lines carry no diff-coverage burden but are still exercised by 28 new page tests for quality (audit T-01). The covered changed files are tested: OpportunityService.ts description-thread (D-2 unit test); LossReasonModal.tsx a11y (3 new asserts); DealForm.tsx onCancel + Saving (2 new asserts). check-exec-readiness.mjs is in tools/ (outside sonar.sources → not diff-coverage-scored).

Every wired surface has a real caller in deals/[id]/page.tsx: Won/Lost→moveStage.mutate, Delete→delete.mutateAsync, Edit+Stakeholders→update.mutate via DealForm.onSubmit. No stub-only compliance. The 4 deferred buttons call toast('Coming soon') (honest affordance, not fake data).
Deferred Clone/Archive/AddProduct/Upload show a 'Coming soon' toast (IFC-257 precedent) — no mocked/simulated data. D-2 fixed the description silent-drop so the Edit dialog does not fake a save.
NF-001: grep of the diff for lucide-react/@heroicons/react-icons/@radix-ui/react-icons/react-feather = 0. Icons stay Material Symbols via the local Icon helper.
NF-002: all 3 wired mutations route through api.opportunity.moveStage/update/delete → tenantProcedure in opportunity.router.ts. No raw/un-tenant'd path introduced.

kpi_results.kpi: Action buttons functional with confirmation dialogs
kpi_results.target: Won/Lost trigger moveStage with confirmation; Edit navigates/edits; Delete functional with confirmation; stakeholder/product/file buttons wired
kpi_results.actual: 5 buttons wired to existing procedures (Won/Lost/Delete/Edit/Stakeholders); Lost uses LossReasonModal, Delete uses a destructive ConfirmationDialog, Edit uses an inline DealForm dialog. 4 buttons with no backend deferred to honest 'Coming soon' toasts + Rule-8 tracking (the stale audit counted account/contact links already wired by IFC-278).

28 new page tests + 3 LossReasonModal a11y + 2 DealForm + 1 application D-2 unit test. page.tsx coverage-excluded (no diff-coverage burden); covered changed files (OpportunityService/LossReasonModal/DealForm) exercised by new tests. pre-ship diff-coverage gate run at final SHA.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Won/Lost buttons trigger moveStage mutations with confirmation
definition_of_done_items.evidence: page.tsx handleWon → moveStage(CLOSED_WON); Lost → LossReasonModal → moveStage(CLOSED_LOST, reason). Tests: 'Won click calls moveStage with CLOSED_WON', 'confirming with a reason calls moveStage with CLOSED_LOST + reason', disabled-state tests.

Edit → DealForm-in-Dialog → opportunity.update (no /deals/[id]/edit route exists → inline dialog avoids a 404). Tests: 'Edit click opens the DealForm dialog pre-populated', 'submitting the form calls update with the deal id and description'.
Delete extraAction → destructive ConfirmationDialog → opportunity.delete → router.push('/deals'). Tests: open/cancel/confirm/onSuccess-navigate/onError + Cancel-before-Confirm DOM order (AC-A11Y-03).

Stakeholders Edit → opens Edit dialog (update covers account/contact). Add Product / File upload → 'Coming soon' toast (no backend) + type/aria-label. Account/contact links already wired by IFC-278. Tests assert each.

No clone/archive procedure exists (archive needs an archivedAt schema migration). Per the orchestrator rule (wire existing procedures; only add a genuinely-missing procedure if feasible) + parallel-run migration risk, these are deferred to honest 'Coming soon' toasts and tracked in 3 surfaces (debt-ledger + gh issue + spec Risk R-1). The stale 2026-03-06 audit predates IFC-278.
92 web + 75 application tests green; new behaviour covered; diff-coverage gate run in pre-ship.

notes:
IFC-280 Deal Detail Action Buttons — wires F-08/F-09 from docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2 on a worktree from origin/main@cb974e527.

STALE-AUDIT CORRECTION: the audit (2026-03-06) predates IFC-278, which already wired the account/contact icon links. The genuinely-remaining no-ops were 9, not 14.

WIRED to existing procedures: Won (moveStage CLOSED_WON; disabled unless stage=NEGOTIATION && !isClosed, matching OpportunityService.markAsWon's precondition), Lost (LossReasonModal → moveStage CLOSED_LOST + reason>=10; disabled when isClosed), Delete (destructive ConfirmationDialog → opportunity.delete soft-delete → router.push('/deals')), Edit (inline DealForm-in-Dialog → opportunity.update — NO new route, as none exists, avoiding DEAD-ON-ARRIVAL), Stakeholders Edit (same Edit dialog).

D-2 (in-scope backend, minimal): OpportunityService.updateOpportunity silently dropped description (omitted from the data param, the same gap as IFC-282 B-04 name). Threaded it through (Opportunity.updateDescription already existed) + unit test, so the Edit dialog's description field truly persists instead of faking a save.

DEFERRED + TRACKED (Rule 8): Clone, Archive (needs archivedAt migration — high parallel-run risk), Add Product, File upload have no backing procedure → honest 'Coming soon' toast (IFC-257 precedent, NOT fake data). Tracked: artifacts/metrics/debt-ledger.yaml + gh issue + spec Risk R-1. Shared-primitive a11y gaps (entity-header spinner/icon aria-hidden, action-sheet icons, destructive-toast role=alert, MoreActionsButton aria-expanded) are app-wide/pre-existing → tracked follow-up R-4 (blast radius). The new dialogs are accessible via Radix by construction.

DealForm: added an optional backward-compatible onCancel prop (create page unchanged) so the dialog Cancel closes instead of navigating; edit-mode submit label is 'Saving…'.

CO-DEPENDENT CI FIX (rides this branch per the 'Co-Dependent Changes' rule): tools/scripts/exec-preflight/check-exec-readiness.mjs did not strip the dependency-type suffix (':FS' — the dominant CSV convention, 500+ rows) when resolving a dependency's attestation dir, so IFC-280's satisfied dep (IFC-278, attested at sprint-16) read as missing. Fixed with dep.split(':')[0]. tools/ is outside sonar.sources so no diff-coverage burden.

Validation: 4/4 (TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build). Tests: 92 web (deals detail+list, LossReasonModal, DealForm) + 75 application. eslint --max-warnings 0 clean. Web build green with the CI env stubs the pre-ship build step injects. page.tsx is coverage-excluded (no diff-coverage burden); covered changed files are unit-tested. Final pre-ship + codex-review run at the final committed SHA before push.
